description: 4-hour strategy set — adapted from proven 15m UTC hour patterns. Entry minutes scaled to 4h cycle (0-239 in 15-min blocks). Same directional edge at proven hours.

conditions.description: 4h markets: wider price acceptance (45-80c). 4h cycles span 4 hours so entry minutes are in 15-min blocks within the cycle.

stats.basis: 4h cycles cover hours 0-3, 4-7, 8-11, 12-15, 16-19, 20-23. Strategies target the proven profitable UTC hours within each 4h block. Entry minute = (targetHour - blockStart) * 60 + originalEntryMinute.

strategies.name: 4h Block08-11 m68 UP (50-80c)
strategies.basis: H09 m08 UP within 4h block 08-11. Entry at minute 68 = (9-8)*60+8

strategies.name: 4h Block20-23 m03 DOWN (50-80c)
strategies.basis: H20 m03 DOWN within 4h block 20-23. Entry at minute 3

strategies.name: 4h Block08-11 m184 UP (50-80c)
strategies.basis: H11 m04 UP within 4h block 08-11. Entry at minute 184 = (11-8)*60+4

strategies.name: 4h Block08-11 m127 UP (50-80c)
strategies.basis: H10 m07 UP within 4h block 08-11. Entry at minute 127 = (10-8)*60+7

strategies.name: 4h Block08-11 m14 DOWN (45-80c)
strategies.basis: H08 m14 DOWN within 4h block 08-11. Entry at minute 14

strategies.name: 4h Block00-03 m12 DOWN (50-78c)
strategies.basis: H00 m12 DOWN within 4h block 00-03. Entry at minute 12
